interesting_routes.capability: Purchase a dedicated phone number valid for 30 days. The number is bound to your wallet address. Default country is US (no regulatory friction). bundles.title: Diligence agent
bundles.thesis: Buy search, then verification, then only enrich the candidates that pass.

route_samples.provider: DataBR — API de Dados Públicos Brasileiros
route_samples.capability: Due diligence empresarial completa — CNPJ + CEIS/CNEP + processos judiciais + licitações + ambiental (multi-fonte)

route_samples.provider: DataBR — API de Dados Públicos Brasileiros
route_samples.capability: Áreas embargadas por desmatamento ilegal — localização, data e infração (IBAMA - Instituto Brasileiro do Meio Ambiente)

route_samples.provider: DataBR — API de Dados Públicos Brasileiros
route_samples.capability: Rede de influência societária — grafo de sócios, empresas conectadas e participações cruzadas

route_samples.provider: Verifik AI
route_samples.capability: Brazil individual background screening using CPF and date of birth. A successful response includes identity-related fields and, when the data provider supplies it, a base64-encoded PDF report. Intended for employment screening, due diligence, and compliance; handle the PDF and metadata under your own legal and retention rules.

route_samples.provider: Property Risk Passport API | Address due diligence for agents
route_samples.capability: Evaluate a US property address for parcel match, FEMA flood zone, flood proximity, taxing entities, school district, permit history, zoning/land-use context, insurance red flags, due-diligence risk score, quality score, recommended next steps, and official source links.

route_samples.provider: Cybercentry ERC-8004 Agent Verification - x402
route_samples.capability: Verify AI agent identity, authenticity and risk using the Cybercentry ERC-8004 Agent Verification (CEAV) API. Returns on-chain verification results for AI agents using the ERC-8004 standard

bundles.title: Wallet-triggered analyst
bundles.thesis: Watch an onchain event, buy outside context, stop if risk is high.

route_samples.provider: AurelianFlo — Compliance APIs for the agent era
route_samples.capability: Exact-match OFAC SDN wallet screening for sanctioned digital currency addresses. Screens one wallet address against Treasury's public SDN advanced XML and returns hit or clear status, asset coverage, sanctioned entity metadata, sanctions programs, list source, listing date, and a manual-review signal for onchain payment and treasury controls.

route_samples.provider: Carbon & Cashmere — Crypto Intelligence Infrastructure
route_samples.capability: Verifiable prop-firm trading results from our own ML-driven strategy: passed $100k FTMO challenge 2026-04-17 with +5.04% return in 5 days, 16 BTC-long trades, 81.25% win rate. Full transparency â trade-level data (entry/exit prices, pnl, exit reasons, ML confidence, regime-at-entry), aggregate statistics (profit factor, max drawdown, avg duration, win/loss streaks, exit-reason breakdown), and broker reconciliation. Data source: cTrader WebSocket (15min-fresh) + internal decision-tracker. First and only x402 service offering verifiable prop-firm track record as research data â not investment advice.

route_samples.provider: BlockRun — Pay-per-call AI gateway
route_samples.capability: Token price lookup. Pass coin identifiers as `/v1/defillama/prices/{coins}` (e.g. `coingecko:bitcoin`, `ethereum:0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2`). Supports comma-separated lists.

route_samples.provider: StableEmail
route_samples.capability: Buy an inbox on stableemail.dev ($1, 30 days). forwardTo is optional — omit it to use as a programmatic mailbox via the messages API (retainMessages enabled automatically). Message content and attachments are retained for 90 days.

route_samples.capability: Top up a forwarding inbox for 30 days ($1)

warnings.title: One provider can dominate the apparent market
warnings.detail: The top providers contribute hundreds to thousands of rows. Count rows, providers, and distinct route patterns separately.

warnings.title: Listed payable route is not quality proof
warnings.detail: The database proves public payment metadata. It does not prove successful delivery, refund behavior, latency, or output quality.

warnings.title: accept_verified=false is common
warnings.detail: Treat many records as marketplace intelligence until a paid-call harness verifies payment and response behavior.

warnings.title: Long-tail routes can be synthetic
warnings.detail: Large route farms are still useful as market signal, but should not be mistaken for organic demand.

warnings.title: Capability text is uneven
warnings.detail: Route descriptions vary from specific service catalogs to generic generated text, so clusters should be reviewed with examples.
